name: Dynamic Route Token Validation Engine

proposal.problem: Currently, the invitation stage resolves guest information locally from the client-side memory using query parameters (?guest=<id>). This bypasses backend database verification, guest opened telemetry updates, and role validation controls.
proposal.solution: Bridge the frontend client with the Express backend infrastructure built in Phase 1 by implementing dynamic route pathname parsing, backend hydration fetch triggers, and role-based header guards.

filesToModify.change: Parse pathname routes /invite/:token on mount and query the backend.
Add async action creator to fetch invitation details and handle status states.
Send HOST role headers on roster updates.

inScope: Backend integration for guest hydration and envelope telemetry.
Adding header guards on HOST and ADMIN data operations.

architecturalDecisions.choice: Parse paths matching /invite/:token directly using window location APIs without react-router-dom.
architecturalDecisions.why: Complies with project constraints (no routing libraries) and provides dynamic URL parsing.

architecturalDecisions.choice: On mounting /invite/:token, fetch guest allocation and canvas setup from GET /api/invite/:token.
architecturalDecisions.why: Syncs canvas configuration from the DB and automatically records guest opened telemetry.

architecturalDecisions.choice: Build fetch utility apiFetch centralizing X-Role: HOST or X-Role: ADMIN header injections.
architecturalDecisions.why: Secures all host/admin modifications and metrics queries.

risksAndMitigations.mitigation: Render a themed loading spinner state.

risksAndMitigations.risk: Server connection failure or offline status
risksAndMitigations.mitigation: Fall back to localStorage cache and show an Offline Mode alert.

tasks: Confirm that both frontend unit tests and backend tests pass cleanly
Check that the backend server is running locally on port 5001
Create client-side HTTP helper src/utils/api.ts with baseURL http://localhost:5001
Implement header configuration appending X-Role based on context
Add api status indicators ('idle' | 'loading' | 'success' | 'error') to sigil.types.ts
Implement async fetchInvitationDetails(token: string) in SigilContext.tsx
Refactor mount loader in src/App.tsx matching routes /invite/:token via regex
If route matches, transition app to RECIPIENT mode and hydrate invitation data
Add visual overlay/spinner when loading states are active
Update dashboard queries in DashboardView.tsx to supply X-Role: HOST headers
Update canvas layout state synchronization mutations to inject authorization properties
Run regression tests verifying frontend and backend stability
Assert that dynamic routing resolutions load without throwing errors
